nasb.text: The Lord appeared in the tent in a pillar of cloud, and the pillar of cloud stood at the doorway of the tent.

esv.text: And the Lord appeared in the tent in a pillar of cloud. And the pillar of cloud stood over the entrance of the tent.

cnv.text: 耶和華在會幕裡，在雲柱中顯現，這雲柱停在會幕的門口上面。

ccb.text: 有云柱停在会幕入口的上方，耶和华在云柱中向他们显现。
